item.gap: When carrying goods that are considered to be <dangerous>, you have to <fill in> a special <form>.

list:hints.hint: risky, hazardous write down, complete document, paper
risky, hazardous write down, complete document, paper
risky, hazardous write down, complete document, paper

item.gap: In the form, you have to write down the name of the <shipper>, the <consignee> and the <carrier>.

list:hints.hint: transporter the person / company that receives the cargo the company that takes cargo from one point to another
transporter the person / company that receives the cargo the company that takes cargo from one point to another
transporter the person / company that receives the cargo the company that takes cargo from one point to another

item.gap: You also have to give <details> about your company, or signatory <organization>.
In the declaration, you state that the packing of goods has been done according to <IMDG Code> rules.
Other data to be included are: the ship’s name and <voyage>, the port of <loading>, the port of <discharge>.

list:hints.hint: trip to accept the cargo to deliver the cargo
trip to accept the cargo to deliver the cargo
trip to accept the cargo to deliver the cargo

item.gap: The form usually ends with a descriptive list of the cargo, including <special marks>, number and kind of <packages>.

list:hints.hint: special symbols to identify cargo the types of containers used
special symbols to identify cargo the types of containers used
